name: Oaktree Acquisition Corp. III Life Sciences Unit
summary: Oaktree Acquisition Corp. III Life Sciences is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. OACCU represents a unit consisting of one Class A ordinary share and a fraction of a warrant of Oaktree Acquisition Corp. III Life Sciences.
